compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## What

The base runtime-dependency count and the `mcp` extra's version floor are stated
inconsistently and incorrectly across docs. Ground truth in `pyproject.toml`
(`dependencies`, lines ~62-66) is **three** base deps — `pyyaml`, `jsonschema`,
`referencing` — and the mcp floor (line ~82) is `mcp>=1.9`.

Drift to correct:
- `README.md:148-151` claims "only two runtime dependencies" (names pyyaml +
  jsonschema, omits `referencing`).
- `README.md:157` claims the mcp extra needs `mcp>=1.2` (should be `mcp>=1.9`).
- `docs/config.md:46-48` claims the "ONLY runtime dependency is `pyyaml`" and quotes a
  stale one-element array `["pyyaml>=6"]`.
- `pyproject.toml:~43` carries its own stale "Two runtime dependencies" comment.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `README.md`, `docs/config.md`, and the `pyproject.toml` comment all state the
      correct base-dependency set (pyyaml, jsonschema, referencing) consistently.
- [ ] The mcp extra floor reads `mcp>=1.9` everywhere it is mentioned.
- [ ] The numbers/version match `pyproject.toml` exactly (verify by re-reading it).

Files: `README.md` (lines ~148-157), `docs/config.md` (lines ~46-48),
`pyproject.toml` (comment ~line 43).
compiled_state.title: P1: Correct runtime-dependency count & mcp version floor across docs + pyproject comment
